title: Type scale is too flat — H1 uses font-bold everywhere, no font-semibold tier
what_you_tried: Compared page headings across Mitglieder, Dashboard, Jahresabschluss, Einstellungen, Inbox in screenshots desktop-10..desktop-21
what_happened: Every page H1 is rendered as text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight. There is no font-semibold level — every title shouts at the same weight.
what_you_expected: A 6-step type scale where page H1 is text-xl font-semibold, section titles are text-base font-semibold, and font-bold is reserved for KPI hero numbers and totals.
suggested_fix: Replace text-2xl font-bold with text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight across page-level headings. Reserve font-bold for tabular-nums hero values only. See section 3.1 of the design review.

title: EÜR header band uses saturated magenta #9c2870, conflicts with brand rosa
what_happened: The EÜR table has a saturated magenta header (background:#9c2870) that competes with the rosa primary (#BE185D) used elsewhere on the page. Two slightly-different brand-pinks fight for attention.
what_you_expected: Calm header — eyebrow text + page title, no colored band. The data is the page; it should not need decoration to assert itself.
suggested_fix: Replace the colored band with eyebrow text-xs uppercase tracking-wider + plain heading. Use bg-muted/30 on the thead row. See section 2.1 EÜR layout proposal with full Tailwind skeleton.

title: No <Card> component — every page re-rolls rounded-xl border bg-card shadow-sm with drift
what_you_tried: Source-read every card-like surface in the admin shell
what_happened: Card pattern is hand-rolled in 10+ places. Radius varies (rounded-xl vs rounded-2xl), shadow varies (shadow-sm vs no shadow), padding varies (p-5 vs p-6 vs px-6 py-4).
what_you_expected: Single <Card> primitive with variants soft/dashed/default. All consumers import from src/lib/components/ui/card/.
suggested_fix: Create src/lib/components/ui/card/card.svelte (likely already partially in shadcn-svelte). Replace open-coded card markup in all consumers. See section 3.5.

title: Input height h-8 (32px) is too tight for finance data entry
what_you_tried: Source-read input.svelte; observed sign-in form input is much taller than admin form inputs
what_happened: The shadcn-svelte default h-8 is jarring next to the sign-in submit button (h-11) and produces cramped form fields in the manual-import sheet.
what_you_expected: h-9 (36px) default — Linear, Mercury, and most modern finance tools use 36-40px input heights.
suggested_fix: Change h-8 to h-9 in input.svelte (both branches). Verify forms still align with adjacent buttons. See section 3.4.

title: Brand rosa is overused — 9 surfaces per screen compete for attention
where: src/lib/components/admin/Sidebar.svelte, Topbar.svelte, jahresabschluss/EurSummary.svelte, KpiCard.svelte hover state, breadcrumb leaf, member-detail header
what_you_tried: Counted brand-color surfaces on dashboard screenshot and EÜR screenshot
what_happened: Rosa appears in: sidebar active item, FW logo, breadcrumb leaf, primary CTA, EÜR header band, KPI hover state, focus rings, manual-import sheet save button, ChecklistItem CTA. 9 places on a single page — rosa fatigue.
what_you_expected: 4 maximum brand-color expressions per screen: sidebar-active, FW logo, primary CTA(s), and one accent/delight moment.
suggested_fix: Demote breadcrumb leaf to text-foreground font-semibold. Remove rosa from KPI hover (the shadow lift is enough). Remove from EÜR header (see UI-002). Use secondary variant for ChecklistItem CTA when empty. See section 3.20.

title: RecentActivity uses native emoji icons (💸📥🎁) — renders inconsistently across OS
what_you_tried: Source-read RecentActivity.svelte and observed dashboard screenshot
what_happened: Activity rows use entity-kind → emoji mapping (💸📥🎁👤🧾📈🔑📁🏢⚙️). On macOS these render as Apple emoji; on Windows/Firefox as Twemoji; on Android as Google emoji. They look like a different designer's work.
what_you_expected: Consistent Lucide SVG icons matching the rest of the app's iconography.
suggested_fix: Create src/lib/components/icons/EntityIcon.svelte that maps entityKind → Lucide path string (reuse paths from Sidebar.svelte ICONS map). Replace the emoji map in RecentActivity. See section 3.10.

title: No status-color tokens — WGBWidget direct-references bg-emerald-500 / bg-orange-500 etc.
what_happened: Direct Tailwind color refs (bg-emerald-500, bg-orange-500, bg-yellow-400, bg-red-500) bypass the theme. The 'Festgeschrieben' indicator separately uses text-green-700 (different green).
what_you_expected: --color-success / --color-warning / --color-danger / --color-info tokens defined in app.css; all status surfaces reference these.
suggested_fix: Add tokens (section 8 of design review). Convert WGBWidget barColor + badgeClasses to use bg-success / bg-warning / etc. Same for Festgeschrieben indicator. See section 3.2.

title: Dashboard hero is 4 identical KPI cards — no narrative, no income/expense framing
what_happened: Dashboard opens with 4 equally-weighted KPI cards. No income-vs-expense framing, no YTD trend, no delta vs last year. The most important Kassenwart-question ('are we in surplus this year?') requires mental arithmetic.
what_you_expected: Two large hero cards (Einnahmen YTD + Ausgaben YTD) with sparkline + delta-vs-LY, then a row of 4 smaller KPI chips below for the operational metrics.
suggested_fix: Build IncomeExpenseHero.svelte + Sparkline.svelte. Demote existing KPI cards to text-lg chip variant in a 4-col row below. Server adds monthlyEinnahmenCents and monthlyAusgabenCents arrays + prior-year totals to dashboard load function. See section 2.3 with full layout sketch and Tailwind skeleton.

title: No year switcher anywhere — Jahresabschluss year list is the only navigation path
what_you_tried: Source-read jahresabschluss routes; viewed desktop-17 and desktop-18
what_happened: To switch between EÜR years, user must back-navigate to /app/jahresabschluss and pick from the list. There is no inline year switcher on the EÜR page itself or on the dashboard.
what_you_expected: A persistent year switcher in the EÜR page header (segment control on desktop, dropdown on mobile), with closed years marked by a green dot.
suggested_fix: Build YearSwitcher.svelte (segment-control pattern). Place it top-right of the EÜR page header. URL strategy: keep /app/jahresabschluss/[year] as canonical, switcher updates URL via SvelteKit navigation. See section 2.2 with full Svelte skeleton.

title: Sign-in page is a brand vacuum — no logo, no Verein name, card floats mid-viewport
what_happened: The card has only an 'Anmelden' H1, helper text, email input, and submit button. No FW logo, no Verein name, no trust framing. Card floats center-screen with no anchor.
what_you_expected: FW rosa bubble + 'Folge der Wolke e.V.' name at top of card. Card anchored to upper-third (pt-20). Soft brand-tint background. Mobile: hero the bubble.
suggested_fix: Add the same logo bubble used in Sidebar.svelte:74-78. Replace 'Anmelden' with 'Willkommen zurück.' Add subtle bg-brand-soft/40 page background. Anchor card pt-20 pb-12, drop min-h-screen items-center.

title: Mobile topbar shows 2 permanently-disabled icons (search, bell)
what_you_tried: Viewed mobile-10-dashboard.png — the topbar shows search-magnifier + bell + avatar
what_happened: Of 3 mobile topbar elements, 2 are disabled placeholders that do nothing on tap. Looks like a broken UI.
what_you_expected: Mobile topbar with only the working elements: FW name on left, avatar dropdown on right. 48px tall.
suggested_fix: Hide the disabled search + bell icons on mobile (md:hidden / md:inline conditionals). Re-enable when those features ship. See section 6.1.

title: Mitglieder year-badges (2024/2025/2026) are visually busy — 3 pills per row
what_happened: Each member row has 3 separate amber-pastel year pills with a circle-icon prefix. 3 pills × 5 members = 15 small pills on screen. Visual noise; the at-a-glance information ('is this member paid up?') is lost in repetition.
what_you_expected: Single multi-segment indicator (e.g., ■ ■ □) showing payment status across the relevant years. Color-coded: filled when paid, empty when not.
suggested_fix: Replace 3-pill pattern with a small horizontal segment indicator. Hover/tap → tooltip with year-by-year breakdown. On mobile, move to row's secondary line as text ('2 von 3 Jahren bezahlt'). See section 4.7.

title: ChecklistItem CTA stays rosa when empty (opacity-50) — looks like a half-disabled button
what_you_tried: Viewed desktop-10-dashboard.png — checklist 'Inbox öffnen →' and 'Transaktionen öffnen →' buttons
what_happened: When count=0, the entire row gets opacity-50 but the CTA is still bg-primary. Reads as 'I'm an active button but I'm dimmed' — confusing.
what_you_expected: Empty-state CTA uses secondary or outline variant so it reads as 'navigate here, but nothing's actionable'. Or hide CTA entirely on empty.
suggested_fix: Add empty-variant prop to ChecklistItem CTA that uses bg-muted text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted/80 instead of bg-primary.

title: No reusable EmptyState component — each list page hand-rolls a different treatment
where: src/lib/components/empty/Welcome.svelte, NoEntries.svelte, SearchNoResults.svelte + inline empties in Rechnungen / Inbox / Transaktionen
what_you_tried: Compared empty-state treatments across Inbox ('Alles geprüft'), Rechnungen ('Noch keine Rechnungen'), Transaktionen ('Keine Transaktionen gefunden'), Jahresabschluss (no buchungen)
what_happened: Inbox empty has a delightful rosa-soft circle with checkmark. Rechnungen empty has a folder icon in soft circle. Transaktionen empty has a small file icon in a gray circle. Three patterns, three sizes, three colors.
what_you_expected: Single EmptyState component: dashed-border card, rosa-soft icon circle, title + description, optional CTA slot.
suggested_fix: Build src/lib/components/ui/empty-state/EmptyState.svelte (icon prop = Lucide name, title, description, children slot). Convert all empty surfaces. See section 3.11 with skeleton.

title: Spacing rhythm drift — page padding varies across routes
where: src/routes/app/+page.svelte (px-4 py-8), jahresabschluss/+page.svelte (px-4 py-8), einstellungen/+page.svelte (px-6 py-?)
what_you_tried: Inspected page wrappers across admin routes
what_happened: Dashboard uses px-4 py-8 lg:px-8. Jahresabschluss uses px-4 py-8 lg:px-8. Einstellungen uses different padding. Card internal padding varies p-5 / p-6 / px-6 py-4. No documented baseline.
what_you_expected: Single page wrapper convention (px-4 py-6 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 lg:py-8) and 2 card paddings (p-5 default, p-6 dense).
suggested_fix: Document baseline in app.css comment. Build PageContainer component that applies the wrapper. See section 3.3.

title: Eyebrow + section pattern used on Einstellungen only — extend to all dense pages
what_happened: Einstellungen uses 'KONTO', 'VEREINSDATEN (NUR LESEND)' eyebrow labels (text-xs uppercase tracking-wider muted) that give the page rhythm and scannability. No other admin page uses this pattern.
what_you_expected: Eyebrow labels above every section on EÜR, dashboard, Mitgliederliste filter section.
suggested_fix: Document the eyebrow pattern as a Tailwind utility (.section-eyebrow @apply text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground). Apply across pages.

title: Transactions page has two competing nav patterns above the empty state
what_happened: Page has a 4-tab segment ('Alle / Ausgaben 0 / Einnahmen 0 / Spenden 0') and a 3-pill quick-filter row ('Diesen Monat / Offene Erstattungen / Spenden YTD') stacked above the empty state. They look similar in weight; the visual hierarchy is ambiguous.
what_you_expected: Primary tab control (border-bottom on active) for kind-filter. Secondary muted pills (text-xs gray) for saved views, labeled 'Ansicht:'.
suggested_fix: Promote 4-tab segment visually (border-b-2 border-primary on active, text-foreground). Demote 3-pill row to muted secondary chip style with 'Ansicht:' label.

title: No dark mode opt-in — :root forces color-scheme: light only
what_happened: :root sets color-scheme: light only — explicitly opts out of OS dark mode. The .dark CSS variables are defined but never used.
what_you_expected: color-scheme: light dark + a small layout-script that adds .dark to <html> when prefers-color-scheme matches.
suggested_fix: Remove 'only' from color-scheme. Add inline script in app.html or +layout.svelte that flips .dark based on matchMedia. Verify WGBWidget bg-emerald-500 etc. work in dark (probably need dark:bg-emerald-600). See section 3.15.

title: PWA install affordance is hidden — InstallPrompt.svelte exists but no surface to trigger
what_happened: InstallPrompt is imported but no visible install action. iOS Safari has no beforeinstallprompt — needs a one-time tip-bottom-card.
what_you_expected: User-menu item 'Als App installieren' that fires when beforeinstallprompt is ready. On iOS, a dismissible bottom hint after 3rd session.
suggested_fix: Add DropdownMenuItem in UserMenu that triggers stored beforeinstallprompt event. Add IOSInstallHint.svelte for Safari path. See section 6.3.

title: No loading skeletons on list pages — flash of empty state during load
where: src/routes/app/inbox/+page.svelte, mitglieder, transactions, rechnungen, projekte, kunden
what_happened: List pages render either the data or the empty state — no skeleton. On slow connections users see a 'no data' flash before the real data arrives.
what_you_expected: <ListSkeleton count={5} /> rendered while data loading; switch to empty state only after load completes.
suggested_fix: Build src/lib/components/ui/skeleton/ListSkeleton.svelte (5 dummy rows with animate-pulse). Wire into pages via {#if data.loading} or use SvelteKit's streamed data API. See section 3.17.

title: Mail templates header strip differs per template — MagicLink is the only correctly-rebuilt one
what_happened: Eingangs-, Erstattungs-, Rejection-, BeitragsReminder-, InvoiceVersendet- have varied header treatments. EingangsMail header has playful 'Ein Liebesbrief von den Finanz-Geschäftler:innen' subtitle in the rosa band — too much, breaks formal-email tone for externals.
what_you_expected: Single brand-strip pattern from MagicLink applied across all 6: uppercase eyebrow 13px, no subtitle, no gradient. Tone branches in body via bezahlt_von_kind.
suggested_fix: Apply MagicLink template structure (line-by-line) to each of the 5 outliers. Move 'Liebesbrief' / playful copy to body for member tone only. Replace pink-200 subtitle color with no subtitle. See section 3.13 + the per-template table.

title: Mail footer Verein data is hardcoded — drifts from env vars
what_happened: Footer 'Folge der Wolke e.V. · Westermühlstraße 6, 80469 München · VR 211227 · Steuernummer 143/215/10028' is a static string literal. The Impressum reads these from env. Two sources of truth.
what_you_expected: Footer interpolates VEREIN_NAME, VEREIN_ADRESSE, VEREIN_VR, VEREIN_STEUERNUMMER from env (passed as props from sender).
suggested_fix: Add veinerData prop to the MagicLinkProps type; pass from sender; render in footer. Same for all 6 templates.

title: Mobile FAB '+ Neu' is disabled — broken main-action affordance
what_you_tried: Viewed mobile-10-dashboard.png — bottom tab bar shows '+ Neu' in rosa
what_happened: FAB is rendered but disabled (aria-label='Schnell hinzufügen (Phase 4)'). Tappable, but nothing happens. The most visually-prominent mobile element is broken.
what_you_expected: Either ship a quick-add bottom sheet (Neue Auslage / Neue Transaktion / Neue Rechnung) or hide the FAB until it works.
suggested_fix: Build QuickAddSheet.svelte with 3 navigation actions opening from FAB tap. OR remove the FAB until ready. See section 6.1.

title: Sheet-resync 'Vorschau prüfen' disabled button is rendered in primary rosa — looks broken
what_happened: The submit button is rendered in rosa with reduced opacity but no clear disabled affordance. It looks like a half-baked CTA.
what_you_expected: When disabled: opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed + bg-muted text-muted-foreground OR switch to secondary variant entirely.
suggested_fix: Add disabled state styling: disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed in button base classes (it might already be there); ensure the button receives the disabled attribute when no files staged.

title: Toast styling uses Sonner defaults — no brand tokens, doesn't match app palette
what_happened: Sonner imported with default styling. No CSS overrides for toast bg / border / text colors to match app theme.
what_you_expected: Toast cards use bg-card border-border with success-soft / danger-soft variants for success / error.
suggested_fix: Add CSS variables override in app.css :root --normal-bg --success-bg --error-bg referencing app tokens. See section 3.18.

title: No PageHeader component — each page rolls its own H1 + subtitle + action area
where: src/routes/app/inbox/+page.svelte, mitglieder, rechnungen, transactions, projekte, kunden, etc.
what_you_tried: Compared page-header markup across 6 admin list pages
what_happened: Every page hand-rolls the header pattern (H1 + count subtitle + right-aligned action button). Spacing varies; alignment varies; the 'count' subtitle ('5 Mitglieder', '0 offene Einreichungen') uses different styles.
what_you_expected: Single PageHeader component: title, subtitle, eyebrow (optional), action slot. Used consistently.
suggested_fix: Build src/lib/components/admin/PageHeader.svelte and convert all 8 admin list pages. See section 1.10.

title: Mitglieder mobile: one row's name renders in rosa (Köhler, Lara) — unclear if marker or bug
what_happened: On the mobile member list, one row ('Köhler, Lara') has its name rendered in rosa, while all other rows are in foreground color. Either a 'current user' marker (uncommunicated) or a hover/focus state stuck on.
what_you_expected: Either explicit visual semantics (a 'Du' badge or 'Du bist eingeloggt als ...') or consistent foreground color for all rows.
suggested_fix: Investigate: is this the current-logged-in user being highlighted? If yes, add an explicit 'Du' badge and a tooltip; demote the color treatment to muted/foreground.

title: Welcome / NoEntries / SearchNoResults — 3 empty-state components with different shapes
what_happened: Three components with overlapping responsibility, different prop shapes, different visual treatments. The Inbox 'Alles geprüft' is a 4th inline pattern not extracted.
what_you_expected: Single EmptyState.svelte (icon, title, description, action slot).
suggested_fix: Consolidate to one EmptyState; deprecate the 3 specific components or have them be thin wrappers (<WelcomeEmptyState /> = <EmptyState icon={Cloud} title='...' ... />). See UI-014.

title: Tabular numerals missing on KPI values and RecentActivity money column
what_happened: KPI hero values use text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight but no tabular-nums. EUR sums in EurSummary.svelte do use tabular-nums. Mixed.
what_you_expected: Every numeric display uses tabular-nums for column alignment, especially currency.
suggested_fix: Add tabular-nums to KpiCard value class. Build a <Money /> primitive used everywhere money is displayed (formats + applies tabular-nums + tracking-tight). See section 1.6.

title: Inbox 'Manuell hinzufügen' is rendered as outline button competing with H1
what_happened: When the inbox is empty, the 'Manuell hinzufügen' outline button (top-right) has the same visual weight as the page H1 because the page is otherwise empty. Manual-import is a rarely-used escape hatch, not the headline action.
what_you_expected: Ghost variant or kebab-menu trigger. Or move into the EmptyState CTA when there's literally nothing else on the page.
suggested_fix: Convert to ghost variant (Button variant='ghost') and add a kebab/three-dot menu next to H1 with rarely-used actions. Or move the 'Manuell hinzufügen' into the EmptyState as a tertiary action.

title: Member detail header strip uses bespoke gradient — only delight surface, but it's a one-off
what_happened: The member detail card has a 4px rosa→pink horizontal accent strip at the top — a delightful brand moment. But it's the only place this pattern appears, so it feels like a leftover from another design.
what_you_expected: Either generalize the pattern (use on dashboard hero cards, EÜR card, sign-in card — sparingly, max 1-2 per page) or leave it as the single 'oh nice' touch on the member detail.
suggested_fix: Decision: keep as the lone delight moment OR extend to the sign-in card top edge (matches the brand-vacuum fix from UI-010). Document either way.

title: Topbar search placeholder is truncated on desktop (Mitglied, Auslage, Rechnung su…)
what_you_tried: Viewed desktop-10-dashboard.png — search field shows 'Mitglied, Auslage, Rechnung su…'
what_happened: Placeholder string is too long for the field width; the '⌘K' kbd badge already conveys the affordance.
what_you_expected: Short placeholder 'Suchen...' with the ⌘K badge.
suggested_fix: Shorten placeholder to 'Suchen…' (the ⌘K kbd is already visible at right).

title: Tablet sidebar (collapsed) loses 'FW' brand bubble breadcrumb feeling — just icons
what_you_tried: Viewed tablet-13-mitglieder.png — sidebar shows just FW + icon stack
what_happened: Tablet (768-1023px) shows the FW logo (rosa bubble) but no Verein name. Functional but feels stark.
what_you_expected: Either a tooltip on the FW bubble showing 'Folge der Wolke', or a thin rosa accent line down the left edge of the sidebar to add brand presence.
suggested_fix: Add title='Folge der Wolke' to the FW bubble in collapsed mode. Optionally add an aria-hidden rosa accent line (1px wide, h-full) on the left edge.

title: JahresabschluKuluss list page year cards are too quiet — entry point to most important admin
what_happened: Year cards are minimal — 'Buchungsjahr 2026 / Offen' with a chevron right. The page that contains the EÜR is dropped into a thin row.
what_you_expected: More visual emphasis on the active year. Card with eyebrow ('Aktuelles Buchungsjahr') + larger H3 + status pill + primary CTA 'EÜR öffnen' inline. Past years remain compact below.
suggested_fix: Split into 'Aktuelles Jahr' (large card with inline CTA) + 'Vergangene Jahre' (compact list).

title: Public form 'Auslage einreichen' is unreachable in current env (redirects to 404 in our session)
what_happened: Both render the 404 page (the rosa 404 template). Suggests an env feature-flag is disabling them or the route is mis-configured for this dev DB.
what_you_expected: Either the form renders or a friendly 'Coming soon' page — not a generic 404.
suggested_fix: Investigate env-gating for the public form. When disabled, render a soft 'Das öffentliche Auslagenformular ist momentan deaktiviert. Schreib uns an folgederwolke@gmail.com' page instead of 404. Use the `<EmptyState>` pattern.

title: Touch targets on bottom tab bar are below iOS 44px minimum on some screens
what_you_tried: Viewed mobile-10-dashboard.png — bottom tab bar shows 5 items (4 tabs + 1 FAB)
what_happened: Tab labels are small (~10px text) with icons above. Tap targets appear close to but possibly below 44px tall.
what_you_expected: All bottom-tab targets ≥ 48px tall on mobile to be safely tappable with thumbs.
suggested_fix: Audit MobileTabBar item heights. Set min-h-[48px] on each tab button. Test with iPhone SE viewport (375×667).

title: Dashboard heading uses email-prefix 'juliaschwarz97' when user has no name — strip digits
what_happened: When no name is set, the email prefix is used as fallback. 'juliaschwarz97' reads like a developer placeholder.
what_you_expected: Strip trailing digits and capitalize: 'juliaschwarz97' → 'Juliaschwarz' or even smarter split 'juliaschwarz97' → 'Julia'.
suggested_fix: In displayName: strip /[0-9]+$/ then capitalize. Or prompt for a name in Einstellungen on first login.

title: Avatar background palette uses 5+ pastel hues — collision risk + brand drift
what_you_tried: Viewed desktop-13-mitglieder.png — 5 members, 5 different pastel avatar bg
what_happened: Each avatar uses a different pastel (amber, pink, purple, lavender, mint). With 50+ members, hash collisions are guaranteed; visual identifiability via color is already weak.
what_you_expected: Reduce to 4 brand-aligned tints (rosa-soft, sky-soft, amber-soft, mint-soft) — or even better, monochrome bg-muted + initials.
suggested_fix: Reduce palette to 4 brand-aligned colors. Or pivot to monochrome (bg-muted text-muted-foreground) — initials carry identification, color carries decoration only.

title: WGBWidget progress bar height 2.5px is too thin — reads as decorative not informational
what_you_tried: Viewed desktop-10-dashboard.png — WGB progress bar at bottom
what_happened: The progress track is h-2.5 (10px) but the fill is barely visible at 0% / 2% values. Reads as a thin line, not a meaningful indicator.
what_you_expected: Slightly thicker bar (h-3 or h-1.5 with bg-muted track + rounded-full) and visible fill even at low values (min-w-[6px] on the inner fill div).
suggested_fix: h-3 on the track. Add min-w-[6px] on the inner fill (so at 1% it still visibly exists). Make the empty-soft 'Im grünen Bereich' pill less rounded to differentiate from buttons.

title: No <Money /> primitive — every money display rolls its own formatter inline
where: Many call sites: KpiCard, EurSummary, ChecklistSection, WGBWidget, mail templates, RecentActivity
what_you_tried: Searched for toLocaleString('de-DE', { style: 'currency', currency: 'EUR' }) across the codebase
what_happened: The formatter is repeated in ~10 places. Each could drift independently in tabular-nums treatment, tracking, font-weight.
what_you_expected: Single <Money cents={x} variant='default|hero|chip' /> component that applies formatter + tabular-nums + appropriate type style.
suggested_fix: Create src/lib/components/ui/money/Money.svelte. Migrate top consumers (dashboard, EÜR, RecentActivity). Mail templates remain inline (server-rendered HTML emails can't import Svelte).

title: Manual-import sheet 'Was war's?' label has small asterisk for required — inconsistent with other forms
what_happened: Manual-import sheet shows 'Was war's?  *' with the asterisk as plain text. Other forms use 'Pflichtfeld' inline text instead.
what_you_expected: Consistent required-field marker — either 'Was war's? (Pflichtfeld)' as faded text suffix, or a colored asterisk via accessible label pattern.
suggested_fix: Standardize on '*' OR a 'Pflichtfeld' inline marker. Document in form pattern guide.

title: Member detail tab control ('Beitrag / Aktivität / Notizen') uses card-style tabs — inconsistent with rest of app
what_happened: Tabs are rendered as 3 large cards-with-borders — feels heavy. Modern tab pattern is text + underline-on-active.
what_you_expected: Slim tab control: text-sm, border-b-2 border-transparent on inactive, border-primary on active, text-foreground active, text-muted-foreground inactive.
suggested_fix: Replace card-style tab buttons with text+underline pattern. ~20 lines changed.

title: No segmented control component — Mitglieder uses 'Liste / Beitrags-Matrix' pattern that is one-off
what_happened: Custom pill-switcher pattern. Looks fine but is hand-rolled — the YearSwitcher proposal (sec 2.2) needs the same pattern.
what_you_expected: <SegmentedControl options={[...]} value={x} /> primitive used wherever 2-3 mutually-exclusive options exist.
suggested_fix: Extract pattern from Mitglieder into src/lib/components/ui/segmented-control/SegmentedControl.svelte. Reuse for YearSwitcher and Transactions tab control.

title: AdminShell uses h-svh which is good but no global page transition
what_happened: Page transitions are instant — no fade or slide between admin routes. Feels slightly jarring on slow connections.
what_you_expected: Subtle opacity fade on page change (200ms ease-out). Existing animate-fade-in CSS keyframe already exists in app.css.
suggested_fix: Add animate-fade-in to the main element on route change. Use SvelteKit's onNavigate hook to trigger. Respect prefers-reduced-motion (already handled in app.css).

title: No section divider pattern — long pages use mt-6 / mt-10 spacing only
what_you_tried: Source-read dashboard and EÜR year page
what_happened: Long pages stack sections with margin-top spacing only. No subtle hairline divider between sections; the eye loses track of section boundaries.
what_you_expected: Optional <Divider /> primitive (border-t border-border, mx-auto, mt-8 mb-6 max-w-{...}) used on long pages between major sections.
suggested_fix: Build Divider.svelte. Apply between dashboard sections (KPIs / Checklist / WGB / Activity) and EÜR sections (totals / sphere-table / freigrenze / bundle).
